properties.description: 'This query searches for Google dork search results that indicate publicly accessible information about your organization.'
properties.name: Flare google dork results
properties.query:
FireworkV2_CL
| where notempty(uid) and RiskScore >= 3
| extend index_name = split(uid, "/")[0]
| extend category_name = split(uid, "/")[1]
| where (index_name == "driller_google") or (index_name == "driller" and category_name contains "google")
